title: Copying field value from a subitem to an item

posts.author: LucG (Luc Groleau)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created a board to track resource time off against each client. I display the content in a calendar view.

How can I control how the information is displayed in the calendar view? The current format displayed is “text_column_value | Client_name”. I’d like to change this to be “Client_name | Sub_Item_Owner”.

Monday1257×258 30.7 KB

posts.author: LucG (Luc Groleau)
posts.cookedHtml: Slight correction. The Calendar view currently displays “Subitem_Name | Client_name”
